vllm.title: [Bugfix] Enable Triton MoE for FP8 per-tensor dynamic
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Without this change and running an moe model with fp8 per-tensor dynamic scales, the triton moe backend will not be selected and marlin would be chosen in the end.

vllm.title: [Model][Multimodal] Add explicit MusicFlamingo adapter
vllm.author: WangHaoyuuu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add an explicit MusicFlamingo adapter that reuses AudioFlamingo3 while accepting MusicFlamingo config/processor with a safe fallback.
Register MusicFlamingoForConditionalGeneration in the multimodal registry.
Fix AudioFlamingo3 encoder compatibility for MusicFlamingo checkpoints and Qwen2Au

vllm.title: Fix `tie_word_embeddings` for multimodal models in Transformers v5
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In Transformers v5, tie_word_embeddings belongs to the config of the class that can see both layers to be tied. For example:
SomeVLModel:
    self.language_model = SomeLanguageModel()
    self.vision_model = SomeVisionModel()

SomeVLModelForMultimodalLM:
    self.model = SomeVLModel()
    self.lm_he

vllm.title: [BugFix] Disable async scheduling for Mamba prefix caching
vllm.author: peakcrosser7
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Async scheduling has been enabled by default since v0.14.0. Currently, Mamba prefix caching ("all" and "align" modes) does not support it.
Therefore, this PR disables async scheduling when prefix-caching is enabled for Mamba models.

vllm.title: Move decode context parallel validationn to `ParallelConfig`

vllm.title: [CI] Enable mypy import following for `vllm/spec_decode`
vllm.author: Lucaskabela
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This change brings us closer to not needing a custom mypy check. Part of #26533
Changes:

Moves vllm/v1/spec_decode into the import following group in mypy.py
Fixes mypy errors caused by SpecConfig type of | None (mostly through asserts and clever ordering)
Adds # type: ignore[type-abstract]

vllm.title: Explicitly set `return_dict` for `apply_chat_template`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In Transformers v5 the default value of return_dict for apply_chat _template was changed to True to match other Tokeniser methods.
This PR explicitly sets:

return_dict=True outside the vllm/ dir so that users get used to the new/expected behaviour of Transformers
return_dict=False inside the vllm/
